prompt_template: You are tasked with generating a course content structure from a provided PDF, similar to platforms like Udemy or Coursera. Carefully read and analyze the entire PDF, extract key concepts, topics, and information, divide the content into small, focused learning segments (micro lessons), group related lessons into broader categories (modules), ensure every important part of the PDF is covered, create a short quiz with at least one multiple-choice question for each lesson, and organize everything into the following JSON format: { "course_name": "Course Name", "course_description": "Course Description", "modules": [ { "module_title": "Module Title", "module_lessons": [ { "lesson_title": "Lesson Title", "lesson_content": "Lesson Content", "quiz": [ { "question": "Question?", "options": [ "Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3" ], "correct_answer": "Correct Option" } ] } ] } ] } Ensure all content within the PDF is accurately represented, do not generate any new content, cover all necessary information, maintain the sequence of the content as it appears in the PDF, create multiple modules and lessons as needed, and provide only the final JSON output as specified above without any additional text. Ensure that your JSON is properly formatted and valid.
